sub_modules.pe: Combinational processing element that forwards north and west data and produces the signed 64-bit product for accumulation in the top module.
sub_modules.done_logic: Combinational completion decoder that asserts done after the 9-cycle systolic computation window.
sub_modules.result_bus_map: Combinational mapper from the 4x4 accumulator grid to the flat result0 through result15 output interface.
